name: mercata-ethereum
description: Ethereum deployment for Mercata contracts with UUPS proxy support

scripts.deploy:proxy: echo 'Usage: CONTRACT_NAME=MyContract INIT_PARAMS=\"[\\"param1\\", \\"param2\\"]\", npx hardhat run scripts/deployWithProxy.js --network <network>'
scripts.deploy:sepolia:deposit-router: CONTRACT_NAME=DepositRouter INIT_PARAMS='["0x8713850E9fF0fd0200ce87C32E3cdB24eD021631", "0x8713850E9fF0fd0200ce87C32E3cdB24eD021631"]' npx hardhat run scripts/deployWithProxy.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:mainnet:deposit-router: CONTRACT_NAME=DepositRouter INIT_PARAMS='["0x8713850E9fF0fd0200ce87C32E3cdB24eD021631", "0x8713850E9fF0fd0200ce87C32E3cdB24eD021631"]' npx hardhat run scripts/deployWithProxy.js --network mainnet
scripts.deploy:sepolia:token: CONTRACT_NAME=MyToken INIT_PARAMS='["MyToken", "MTK", 1000000]' npx hardhat run scripts/deployWithProxy.js --network sepolia
scripts.deploy:mainnet:token: CONTRACT_NAME=MyToken INIT_PARAMS='["MyToken", "MTK", 1000000]' npx hardhat run scripts/deployWithProxy.js --network mainnet
